name: Case 3 — Medium Risk (one extra item)
description: Chart and bill agree on pneumonia and antibiotics, but the bill adds a steroid injection that the chart does not document.
chart_text: Patient admitted for pneumonia and monitored for 2 days. Treated with antibiotics during the inpatient stay. Responded well to treatment.
bill_text: Claim submitted for pneumonia, 2 day inpatient stay. Medications billed: antibiotics. Additional steroid injection procedure billed. Total claim amount: $3,200.
